description: Single-module AGP app with a planted Kotlin defect (an empty catch in MainActivity.kt). The qodana.yaml bootstrap accepts SDK licenses and installs platforms;android-34 (the compile SDK). A Qodana scan is an IDE Gradle model import + inspections (not a build), so THIS fixture's scan needs no build-tools/aapt2. Validates qodana-android end to end: build + bootstrap + AGP import + Kotlin analysis producing SARIF, with plugins loaded cleanly. Network on (android's accepted cost). qodana-android reuses the qodana-jvm dist (driver QDJVM), so the empty catch surfaces as CatchMayIgnoreException — the same inspection jvm-maven-basic pins. The layout's AndroidLint defects (HardcodedText/ContentDescription) are asserted once AndroidLint is confirmed to run here (QD-11439).

expectations.reason: STARTING-GUESS id: the planted empty `catch (e: Exception) {}` in MainActivity.kt must surface as CatchMayIgnoreException (confirmed for the shared qodana-jvm dist in jvm-maven-basic; here on Kotlin). If the Kotlin id differs, read the observed id from the CI failure inventory dump and pin it confirmed.
